presentation.note: Source is InvesCore Property Business Plan 2026. Canonical slides selected for each category.

fonts.note: Montserrat is the brand font for all slides. Must be installed for correct rendering.

slides.description: Cover slide: full background image, company name + presentation title, logo
slides.when_to_use: Always first slide. Contains the presentation title, date, and company name.

dynamic_fields.name: presentation_title
dynamic_fields.description: Main title text, e.g. 'BUSINESS PLAN 2026' or 'Q1 MARKET UPDATE'

slides.description: Closing slide: full background image with thank-you text and contact info
slides.when_to_use: Always last slide. Contains closing message and contact information.

slides.description: Contents/agenda slide: full background image, section list with page references
slides.when_to_use: Slide 2 of any presentation with 5+ content slides. Lists all major sections.

slides.description: Section transition: section title + brief description, clean layout with decorative elements
slides.when_to_use: Between major topic changes. Contains the section title and a 1-2 sentence overview.

dynamic_fields.name: section_title
dynamic_fields.description: The section heading, e.g. '2025 OPERATIONAL GOALS'

dynamic_fields.name: section_description
dynamic_fields.description: 1-2 sentence overview of what this section covers

shapes.name: Object5
shapes.text: Starting in 2025, the company plans to transition its core business model from Project development to Comprehensive project management. This shift aims to diversify risks associated with new project development while enhancing operational efficiency.

shapes.text:

slides.description: Text-focused content: title + subtitle + main body text paragraphs
slides.when_to_use: General content with a title and supporting text. Best for strategy, analysis, narrative.

dynamic_fields.name: body_text
dynamic_fields.description: Main content text, can include multiple sentences or bullet points separated by |

dynamic_fields.name: subtitle_label
dynamic_fields.description: Small colored label above the title, e.g. 'STRATEGY' or 'KEY FINDINGS'

shapes.name: Object7
shapes.text:
Develop investment vehicles that support long-term investments, targeting professional and institutional investors.  Provide Value-Add and Opportunistic investment strategies to the Mongolian and Central Asian markets, acting as an operator to ensure the effective implementation of business plans. 
Create new investment vehicles based on opportunities arising from legal and regulatory reforms, and implement a REIT-like structure to secure a leading position in the market. 
Enhance the ultimate return to investors by using new construction projects as an investment base early in the construction process, when added value is less absorbed.

shapes.name: Object13
shapes.text: In 2025, it is planned to create a private investment fund under the management of Invescore Asset Management LLC, through which rental income and asset management returns will be distributed as fund dividends.

shapes.name: Object14
shapes.text: REAL ESTATE-BASED INVESTMENT AND FUND OPERATOR

slides.description: Financial/data table: title + tabular data with row labels and column values
slides.when_to_use: For presenting structured numerical data, budgets, projections in table format.
fixed_elements: all data cells (must be edited manually per slide)

slides.description: Two-column comparison: topic A vs topic B, each with title and detailed text
slides.when_to_use: Compare two items, policies, scenarios, or approaches side by side.

dynamic_fields.name: left_title
dynamic_fields.description: Left column heading, e.g. 'LAW ON REAL ESTATE TAX'

dynamic_fields.name: right_title
dynamic_fields.description: Right column heading, e.g. 'LAW ON CORPORATE INCOME TAX'

dynamic_fields.name: left_content
dynamic_fields.description: Left column body text, bullet points separated by |

dynamic_fields.name: right_content
dynamic_fields.description: Right column body text, bullet points separated by |

shapes.name: Object12
shapes.text:
(Amended by the Law of June 5, 2024, and shall be enforced from June 1, 2025.)

6.4. The rate and amount of tax imposed on immovable property for projects implemented under the regional development policy may be determined by the aimag, the capital city's Citizens' Representative Khural, or the Council of a state-level city. The rate and amount may be reduced by up to 0.6 percent for a period of up to 10 years, compared to the rate established under Article 6.1 of this Law.

7.3. Immovable property within industrial and technological parks shall be exempt from immovable property tax for the first 5 years and shall receive a 50 percent discount for the following 5 years.

7.4. Sports facilities serving citizens shall be fully exempt (100%) from immovable property tax for the first 5 years.

7.5. Real estate tax on buildings and structures that meet international standards and are designed to provide public libraries, senior centers, primary health care, education, cultural, and social welfare services may be exempted for the first 5 years after the decision to put the real estate into operation is made, provided they are built in line with national or local city development policies and plans.

shapes.name: Object13
shapes.text:
Tax Relief:

22.5.8. Tax on income equal to 50% of the investment income from the free zone of an enterprise that has invested 300,000 USD or more in establishing a warehouse, loading and unloading facility, hotel, tourist complex, or an import-substituting or export-producing factory in a free zone.

22.5.18. Tax relief on income generated from the activities of an organization implementing rural housing initiatives, reduced by 90%.

22.9 Investments in depreciable fixed assets, financial support, and donations provided to unrelated parties for the purpose of supporting the following activities, which are not related to the taxpayer's income-generating activities, shall be deducted from the tax imposed under Article 20.1 of this Law as part of the taxpayer's social responsibility

22.5.22. Tax on income from the taxpayer's main activity related to an import-substituting and export-supporting project aligned with Mongolia's regional development concept, to be implemented after January 1, 2025. A 90% reduction will apply for 5 years, starting from the next reporting period after income generation begins.

dynamic_fields.name: title
dynamic_fields.description: Primary title (all caps), e.g. 'MARKET ENVIRONMENT OF KEY SEGMENTS'

dynamic_fields.name: subtitle
dynamic_fields.description: Subtitle/context label, e.g. 'RESIDENTIAL APARTMENT: A POTENTIAL NEW SECTOR'

shapes.name: Object14
shapes.text: Due to the weak real purchasing power of the market, citizens who do not have mortgage loans   + 30,000 people moving to UB every year   + High demand for housing among foreigners

shapes.name: Object15
shapes.text: In June 2024, the average salary exceeded ₮2 million for the first time. The highest demand for 2-room apartments falls within the ₮1.5–4 million range. As a result, if two or more people in a family have a salary income, it becomes possible to rent an average 2-room apartment.

shapes.name: Object16
shapes.text:
There is no real example of planning and budget management in line with rental needs in the UB market.

The minimum rental payment terms are 3+1.

The Bank of Mongolia reported that rental housing prices increased by 23% in September.

shapes.name: Object17
shapes.text:
​               ↑​
It is possible to develop medium-scale development on land in B+ and B zones close to public transportation networks, according to standard designs, and at a reasonable budget.
               ↑​
In zones A+ and A, there are opportunities for studio apartments targeted at young professionals, with projects featuring limited parking and concierge services.
